message:
feat(process,scheduler): add process cancellation and refine scheduler tests

Process: add checkpoint-based cancellation to Child::wait(),
Child::wait_with_output(), and Child::wait_with_output_lines() loops so
that long-running child processes can be interrupted when the parent Cx
scope is cancelled, returning io::ErrorKind::Interrupted.

Scheduler intrusive: tighten link/unlink assertions and add
checked-arithmetic guards for the intrusive linked-list node count.

Tests: expand local_queue_dead_task_bug and priority_scheduler_dos
regression tests with additional edge-case scenarios discovered during
audit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
